title: AdvanceArmy
description: AdvanceArmy is a military warfare themed mod that includes controllable combat AI soldiers, multiple military armed vehicles that can be driven by both players and AI, support skills for combo rewards, powerful monster armies, and some defensive challeng
body:
A vanguard force allied in chaotic time and space arrived early in this world. They were composed of troops from various parallel worlds and other mods from the development team.
Advance Force is a military warfare themed mod that includes controllable combat AI soldiers, multiple military armed vehicles that can be driven by both players and AI, support skills for combo rewards, powerful monster armies, and some defensive challenges.

Dependency: This mod is based on the [WarMachineLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/warmachinelib) and its main purpose is to showcase the latest achievable features, provide players with AI soldiers and vehicles, and quickly update to higher versions compared to the author's other mods.

Optional: Install [SagerFx](https://modrinth.com/mod/sagerfx) for a complete particle effect experience (without this mod, particle effects are very rudimentary)
